name: frontend-design-director
description: A Codex skill for polished, accessible, responsive, non-generic frontend UI/UX.

interface.shortDescription: Polished, accessible frontend UI/UX for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Frontend Design Director packages a Codex skill that pushes frontend work toward production-quality UI/UX: stronger hierarchy, accessibility, responsive behavior, design-system consistency, product-specific visual direction, and visual QA discipline.
defaultPrompt: $frontend-design-director Redesign this dashboard with better hierarchy, accessibility, responsiveness, and product polish.
$frontend-design-director Review this UI for UX, accessibility, responsiveness, design-system fit, and AI-design patterns.
$frontend-design-director Build a production-quality settings page using the existing project stack and design conventions.
